nasb.text: Then Joshua said to the people, “Consecrate yourselves, for tomorrow the Lord will do wonders among you.”

esv.text: Then Joshua said to the people, “Consecrate yourselves, for tomorrow the Lord will do wonders among you.”

cnv.text: 約書亞對人民說：“你們要自潔，因為明天耶和華要在你們中間行奇事。”

ccb.text: 约书亚又对民众说：“你们要洁净自己，因为明天耶和华要在你们当中行奇事。”
